title: Analyze knowledge graph health post-rebuild
description: Read data/knowledge-graph.json (95 nodes, 129 edges after cleanup). Produce a health assessment covering: node quality, edge density, orphan nodes (23 remain), inbox residue (11 items), category balance, tag coherence. Also generate a cleanup guide for WorkBuddy to review the inbox items. Output structured JSON + Markdown to super-jarvis/outputs/qclaw/
